problem_solved: EMS crews need efficient, reliable electronic patient care reporting that integrates with billing, quality assurance, and hospital data sharing workflows
solution_description: Cloud-based ePCR platform (part of ZOLL Data Systems) providing comprehensive EMS documentation, integrated billing, crew scheduling, and analytics. Web and mobile access for field documentation with real-time data synchronization to hospital systems
notes: Established ePCR player integrated with ZOLL's device ecosystem. Part of larger medical technology company. Good Varden fit for EMS documentation infrastructure. Acquisition by Asahi Kasei.
